data.content: Implementation complete on ship-11b1 worktree branch (commit 061aed44). All 3 sites cleaned: terminal-manager.ts:282 reads agent.provider directly; take-agent.ts:317 builds LeaseAuditAgent from canonical fields; take-iteration.ts widens AgentOutcomeRecord.agent to carry provider/flavor and populates at construction. grep -rn normalizeAgentIdentity src/lib/terminal-manager*.ts returns zero hits. All 4 quality gates green (lint, tsc, 3122 tests pass, build).
